question: Which products have the highest margin?
sql: SELECT name, brand, category, retail_price, cost, ROUND(SAFE_DIVIDE(retail_price - cost, retail_price) * 100, 1) AS catalog_margin_pct FROM `bigquery-public-data.thelook_ecommerce.products` WHERE retail_price > 0 ORDER BY catalog_margin_pct DESC LIMIT 15
analyst_notes: This is CATALOG margin (list price vs cost) — what pricing intends. Realized margin (what sales actually delivered) needs order_items joined to inventory_items; the two diverge with discounting. Ask which one the user means or state the choice.
author: claude-draft
